description:
Legal document, in Arabic script. Mentions some works at a house in Fusṭāṭ, "tajdīd fī al-makān allatī lahu bi-Miṣr". Also mentions a stable, and probably the collapse of a roof over it. Needs examination.

On verso, probably of original use, but later effaced, contains jottings of a state document. Traces of chancery script are visible. Some of the blessings phrases are readable: "ayyada Allah Taʿālā".
description_he: מסמך משפטי, בכתב ערבי. מוזכרים עבודות בבית בפסטאט, אורוות, וכנראה קריסת גג. בגב הדף שרידי רישומים ממסמך ממלכתי.
